markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO progress, discuss new initiatives, and align on 2025 priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Audit Pivot:** The AI audit tool (Glean) is failing on bulk web fetches. The new plan is a manual audit, prioritized by product (e.g., outdated "Governance Cloud" mentions), to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**LLM Strategy:** The plan is to fix Diligent's LLM visibility gaps (where competitors appear but Diligent doesn't) with light-touch updates (e.g., FAQ insertions), treating them as "marginal gains" rather than full content pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [**Reporting Overhaul:** A new reporting dashboard is proposed for Tyler, using Ahrefs (Diligent's new standard tool) to track Share of Voice and Page 1 rankings against specific competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [**2025 Focus:** The top priority is refreshing content for the core "Governance" product, which is showing performance decay, before expanding to newer products like "Vault."](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Challenges

  - [An AI-powered audit using Glean is failing on bulk web fetches, getting stuck in loops and unable to process the large content volume (12–15 years of content).](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use AI to map content clusters, identify outdated products ("Governance Cloud"), and prioritize pages for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Pre-scrape all URLs and feed the static data to the AI. This bypasses the tool's web-fetch weakness and should prevent context loss.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Contingency:** If the Glean tool remains unreliable, the audit will proceed manually, prioritized by product.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### LLM Visibility Strategy

  - [**Problem:** A Scrunch report shows Diligent is missing from key LLM queries (Google AI Overviews, GPT, Perplexity) where competitors like Onboard and BoardVantage appear.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [**Approach:** Treat this as a "marginal gain" initiative, not a core content project.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [**Google AI Overviews:** Fix with simple SEO updates (e.g., FAQ insertions).](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Other LLMs:** Requires guidance from Diligent on prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The data is directional and fluctuates, so the goal is to "plug holes" at scale with light-touch optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Reporting & Analytics Overhaul

  - [**Goal:** Create a new reporting dashboard for Tyler to track competitor gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [**Proposed Metrics:** Share of Voice, Top Positions, and Average Position.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Use Ahrefs, Diligent's new standard SEO tool, for consistent reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Refinements:**](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Focus on **Page 1 rankings only** for a consistent baseline, as tracking beyond page 1 is unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [Segment data by **product/pillar cluster** and track against the closest competitor for that specific area.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Include consideration-stage terms to evaluate the performance of newly approved legal pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Scrunch Data Migration

  - [**Request:** Tyler wants to migrate historical performance data and/or settings from growthx's Scrunch account to Diligent's new in-house instance.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Ensures reporting consistency and avoids starting from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### 2025 Content Priorities

  - [**Top Priority:** Refresh content for the core "Governance" product, which is showing performance decay.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [**Secondary Priority:** Expand to newer products like "Vault" with light-touch user journey tests (e.g., 8 high-potential pieces).](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**OOTO:**](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [**Vivek:** Dec 17–Jan 1 & Jan 12–16. Will monitor Slack for emergencies.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [**Kezia:** Dec 23 (PM)–Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Meeting Reschedule:** Moving from Wednesday to Tuesday. Vivek will send new time slots.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Check with the Scrunch team on data/settings migration feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Send new meeting time slots for Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Follow up with Tyler on Slack regarding proposed reporting metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Chase the internal team for the new ESG page link (expected Jan).](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Test the pre-scraping method for the Glean content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [Discuss the LLM visibility strategy with Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/8QSCGoeaFxM7GBLGV6aRZYCePvyW-KzM?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
